1â†’# =============================================================================
     2â†’# MyConvergio Agent Management
     3â†’# =============================================================================
     4â†’# Version: 2.0.0
     5â†’# =============================================================================
     6â†’
     7â†’.PHONY: install install-local upgrade test clean update check-sync version help lint validate
     8â†’
     9â†’# Directories
    10â†’AGENTS_SRC := .claude/agents
    11â†’RULES_SRC := .claude/rules
    12â†’SKILLS_SRC := .claude/skills
    13â†’CLAUDE_HOME := $(HOME)/.claude
    14â†’GLOBAL_AGENTS := $(CLAUDE_HOME)/agents
    15â†’GLOBAL_RULES := $(CLAUDE_HOME)/rules
    16â†’GLOBAL_SKILLS := $(CLAUDE_HOME)/skills
    17â†’
    18â†’# Colors
    19â†’GREEN := \033[0;32m
    20â†’YELLOW := \033[1;33m
    21â†’BLUE := \033[0;34m
    22â†’RED := \033[0;31m
    23â†’NC := \033[0m
    24â†’
    25â†’# Default target
    26â†’.DEFAULT_GOAL := help
    27â†’
    28â†’help:
    29â†’	@echo "$(BLUE)MyConvergio Agent Management$(NC)"
    30â†’	@echo ""
    31â†’	@echo "$(YELLOW)For New Users:$(NC)"
    32â†’	@echo "  make install        Install agents, rules, and skills to ~/.claude/"
    33â†’	@echo ""
    34â†’	@echo "$(YELLOW)For Existing Users:$(NC)"
    35â†’	@echo "  make upgrade        Update to latest version (clean + install)"
    36â†’	@echo ""
    37â†’	@echo "$(YELLOW)Other Options:$(NC)"
    38â†’	@echo "  make install-local  Install to current project only (./.claude/)"
    39â†’	@echo "  make clean          Remove all installed components from ~/.claude/"
    40â†’	@echo "  make version        Show installed version info"
    41â†’	@echo ""
    42â†’	@echo "$(YELLOW)Development:$(NC)"
    43â†’	@echo "  make test           Run agent tests"
    44â†’	@echo "  make lint           Lint agent YAML frontmatter"
    45â†’	@echo "  make validate       Validate Constitution compliance"
    46â†’
    47â†’install:
    48â†’	@echo "$(BLUE)Installing MyConvergio to $(CLAUDE_HOME)/...$(NC)"
    49â†’	@echo ""
    50â†’	@# Install agents
    51â†’	@mkdir -p $(GLOBAL_AGENTS)
    52â†’	@cp -r $(AGENTS_SRC)/* $(GLOBAL_AGENTS)/
    53â†’	@AGENT_COUNT=$$(find $(GLOBAL_AGENTS) -name '*.md' ! -name 'CONSTITUTION.md' ! -name 'CommonValuesAndPrinciples.md' ! -name 'SECURITY_FRAMEWORK_TEMPLATE.md' | wc -l | tr -d ' '); \
    54â†’	echo "  $(GREEN)âœ“$(NC) Installed $$AGENT_COUNT agents"
    55â†’	@# Install rules
    56â†’	@mkdir -p $(GLOBAL_RULES)
    57â†’	@cp -r $(RULES_SRC)/* $(GLOBAL_RULES)/
    58â†’	@RULES_COUNT=$$(find $(GLOBAL_RULES) -name '*.md' | wc -l | tr -d ' '); \
    59â†’	echo "  $(GREEN)âœ“$(NC) Installed $$RULES_COUNT rules"
    60â†’	@# Install skills
    61â†’	@mkdir -p $(GLOBAL_SKILLS)
    62â†’	@cp -r $(SKILLS_SRC)/* $(GLOBAL_SKILLS)/
    63â†’	@SKILLS_COUNT=$$(find $(GLOBAL_SKILLS) -type d -mindepth 1 -maxdepth 1 | wc -l | tr -d ' '); \
    64â†’	echo "  $(GREEN)âœ“$(NC) Installed $$SKILLS_COUNT skills"
    65â†’	@echo ""
    66â†’	@echo "$(GREEN)âœ… Installation complete!$(NC)"
    67â†’	@echo ""
    68â†’	@echo "$(YELLOW)Note:$(NC) Your ~/.claude/CLAUDE.md was NOT modified."
    69â†’	@echo "      Create your own or copy from docs/examples/ if needed."
    70â†’
    71â†’install-local:
    72â†’	@echo "$(BLUE)Installing to current project ./.claude/...$(NC)"
    73â†’	@mkdir -p .claude/agents .claude/rules .claude/skills
    74â†’	@cp -r $(AGENTS_SRC)/* .claude/agents/
    75â†’	@cp -r $(RULES_SRC)/* .claude/rules/
    76â†’	@cp -r $(SKILLS_SRC)/* .claude/skills/
    77â†’	@echo "$(GREEN)âœ… Local installation complete$(NC)"
    78â†’
    79â†’upgrade:
    80â†’	@echo "$(BLUE)Upgrading MyConvergio...$(NC)"
    81â†’	@echo ""
    82â†’	@# Show current version if exists
    83â†’	@if [ -f "$(GLOBAL_AGENTS)/core_utility/CONSTITUTION.md" ]; then \
    84â†’		echo "$(YELLOW)Current installation found. Removing old version...$(NC)"; \
    85â†’	else \
    86â†’		echo "$(YELLOW)No previous installation found. Installing fresh...$(NC)"; \
    87â†’	fi
    88â†’	@$(MAKE) clean --no-print-directory
    89â†’	@$(MAKE) install --no-print-directory
    90â†’	@echo ""
    91â†’	@echo "$(GREEN)âœ… Upgrade complete!$(NC)"
    92â†’
    93â†’clean:
    94â†’	@echo "$(BLUE)Removing installed components...$(NC)"
    95â†’	@rm -rf $(GLOBAL_AGENTS)/* 2>/dev/null || true
    96â†’	@rm -rf $(GLOBAL_RULES)/* 2>/dev/null || true
    97â†’	@rm -rf $(GLOBAL_SKILLS)/* 2>/dev/null || true
    98â†’	@echo "  $(GREEN)âœ“$(NC) Cleaned ~/.claude/agents/"
    99â†’	@echo "  $(GREEN)âœ“$(NC) Cleaned ~/.claude/rules/"
   100â†’	@echo "  $(GREEN)âœ“$(NC) Cleaned ~/.claude/skills/"
   101â†’	@echo ""
   102â†’	@echo "$(YELLOW)Note:$(NC) ~/.claude/CLAUDE.md was NOT removed (user config)."
   103â†’
   104â†’version:
   105â†’	@echo "$(BLUE)MyConvergio Version Info$(NC)"
   106â†’	@echo ""
   107â†’	@cat VERSION | head -6
   108â†’	@echo ""
   109â†’	@echo "$(BLUE)Installed Components:$(NC)"
   110â†’	@if [ -d "$(GLOBAL_AGENTS)" ]; then \
   111â†’		AGENT_COUNT=$$(find $(GLOBAL_AGENTS) -name '*.md' 2>/dev/null | wc -l | tr -d ' '); \
   112â†’		echo "  Agents: $$AGENT_COUNT"; \
   113â†’	else \
   114â†’		echo "  Agents: $(RED)not installed$(NC)"; \
   115â†’	fi
   116â†’	@if [ -d "$(GLOBAL_RULES)" ]; then \
   117â†’		RULES_COUNT=$$(find $(GLOBAL_RULES) -name '*.md' 2>/dev/null | wc -l | tr -d ' '); \
   118â†’		echo "  Rules:  $$RULES_COUNT"; \
   119â†’	else \
   120â†’		echo "  Rules:  $(RED)not installed$(NC)"; \
   121â†’	fi
   122â†’	@if [ -d "$(GLOBAL_SKILLS)" ]; then \
   123â†’		SKILLS_COUNT=$$(find $(GLOBAL_SKILLS) -type d -mindepth 1 -maxdepth 1 2>/dev/null | wc -l | tr -d ' '); \
   124â†’		echo "  Skills: $$SKILLS_COUNT"; \
   125â†’	else \
   126â†’		echo "  Skills: $(RED)not installed$(NC)"; \
   127â†’	fi
   128â†’
   129â†’test:
   130â†’	@echo "$(BLUE)Running agent tests...$(NC)"
   131â†’	@./scripts/test-deployment.sh
   132â†’
   133â†’lint:
   134â†’	@echo "$(BLUE)Linting agent YAML frontmatter...$(NC)"
   135â†’	@for file in $$(find $(AGENTS_SRC) -name '*.md' ! -name 'CONSTITUTION.md' ! -name 'CommonValuesAndPrinciples.md' ! -name 'SECURITY_FRAMEWORK_TEMPLATE.md' ! -name 'MICROSOFT_VALUES.md'); do \
   136â†’		if ! head -1 "$$file" | grep -q '^---$$'; then \
   137â†’			echo "$(YELLOW)Warning: $$file missing YAML frontmatter$(NC)"; \
   138â†’		fi; \
   139â†’	done
   140â†’	@echo "$(GREEN)âœ… Lint complete$(NC)"
   141â†’
   142â†’validate:
   143â†’	@echo "$(BLUE)Validating Constitution compliance...$(NC)"
   144â†’	@CONSTITUTION="$(AGENTS_SRC)/core_utility/CONSTITUTION.md"; \
   145â†’	if [ ! -f "$$CONSTITUTION" ]; then \
   146â†’		echo "$(YELLOW)Warning: CONSTITUTION.md not found$(NC)"; \
   147â†’		exit 1; \
   148â†’	fi
   149â†’	@echo "$(GREEN)âœ… Constitution found$(NC)"
   150â†’	@echo "$(BLUE)Checking agents for security framework...$(NC)"
   151â†’	@MISSING=0; \
   152â†’	for file in $$(find $(AGENTS_SRC) -name '*.md' ! -name 'CONSTITUTION.md' ! -name 'CommonValuesAndPrinciples.md'); do \
   153â†’		if ! grep -q "Security" "$$file" 2>/dev/null; then \
   154â†’			echo "$(YELLOW)Missing security section: $$file$(NC)"; \
   155â†’			MISSING=$$((MISSING + 1)); \
   156â†’		fi; \
   157â†’	done; \
   158â†’	if [ $$MISSING -gt 0 ]; then \
   159â†’		echo "$(YELLOW)âڑ ï¸ڈ  $$MISSING agents missing security framework$(NC)"; \
   160â†’	else \
   161â†’		echo "$(GREEN)âœ… All agents have security framework$(NC)"; \
   162â†’	fi
   163â†’
   164â†’# =============================================================================
   165â†’# Maintainer Commands (not in help - for internal use)
   166â†’# =============================================================================
   167â†’
   168â†’update:
   169â†’	@echo "$(BLUE)Syncing from ConvergioCLI...$(NC)"
   170â†’	@./scripts/sync-from-convergiocli.sh
   171â†’
   172â†’check-sync:
   173â†’	@echo "$(BLUE)Checking for upstream changes in ConvergioCLI...$(NC)"
   174â†’	@curl -s "https://api.github.com/repos/Roberdan/convergio-cli/commits?path=src/agents/definitions&per_page=1" 2>/dev/null | \
   175â†’		grep -E '"sha"|"message"|"date"' | head -6 || echo "Could not fetch (check network)"
   176â†’

   165â†’# Maintainer Commands (not in help - for internal use)
   166â†’# =============================================================================
   167â†’
   168â†’update:
   169â†’	@echo "$(BLUE)Syncing from ConvergioCLI...$(NC)"
   170â†’	@./scripts/sync-from-convergiocli.sh
   171â†’
   172â†’check-sync:
   173â†’	@echo "$(BLUE)Checking for upstream changes in ConvergioCLI...$(NC)"
   174â†’	@curl -s "https://api.github.com/repos/Roberdan/convergio-cli/commits?path=src/agents/definitions&per_page=1" 2>/dev/null | \
   175â†’		grep -E '"sha"|"message"|"date"' | head -6 || echo "Could not fetch (check network)"
   176â†’

content.content:
Like du but more intuitive

Usage: dust [OPTIONS] [PATH]...

Arguments:
  [PATH]...  Input files or directories

Options:
  -d, --depth <DEPTH>              Depth to show
  -T, --threads <THREADS>          Number of threads to use
      --config <FILE>              Specify a config file to use
  -n, --number-of-lines <NUMBER>   Number of lines of output to show. (Default is terminal_height - 10)
  -p, --full-paths                 Subdirectories will not have their path shortened
  -X, --ignore-directory <PATH>    Exclude any file or directory with this path
  -I, --ignore-all-in-file <FILE>  Exclude any file or directory with a regex matching that listed in this file, the file entries will be added to the ignore regexs provided by --invert_filter
  -L, --dereference-links          dereference sym links - Treat sym links as directories and go into them
  -x, --limit-filesystem           Only count the files and directories on the same filesystem as the supplied directory
  -s, --apparent-size              Use file length instead of blocks
  -r, --reverse                    Print tree upside down (biggest highest)
  -c, --no-colors                  No colors will be printed (Useful for commands like: watch)
  -C, --force-colors               Force colors print
  -b, --no-percent-bars            No percent bars or percentages will be displayed
  -B, --bars-on-right              percent bars moved to right side of screen
  -z, --min-size <MIN_SIZE>        Minimum size file to include in output
  -R, --screen-reader              For screen readers. Removes bars. Adds new column: depth level (May want to use -p too for full path)
      --skip-total                 No total row will be displayed
  -f, --filecount                  Directory 'size' is number of child files instead of disk size
  -i, --ignore-hidden              Do not display hidden files
  -v, --invert-filter <REGEX>      Exclude filepaths matching this regex. To ignore png files type: -v "\.png$"
  -e, --filter <REGEX>             Only include filepaths matching this regex. For png files type: -e "\.png$"
  -t, --file-types                 show only these file types
  -w, --terminal-width <WIDTH>     Specify width of output overriding the auto detection of terminal width
  -P, --no-progress                Disable the progress indication
      --print-errors               Print path with errors
  -D, --only-dir                   Only directories will be displayed
  -F, --only-file                  Only files will be displayed. (Finds your largest files)
  -o, --output-format <FORMAT>     Changes output display size. si will print sizes in powers of 1000. b k m g t kb mb gb tb will print the whole tree in that size [possible values: si, b, k, m, g, t, kb, mb, gb, tb]
  -S, --stack-size <STACK_SIZE>    Specify memory to use as stack size - use if you see: 'fatal runtime error: stack overflow' (default low memory=1048576, high memory=1073741824)
  -j, --output-json                Output the directory tree as json to the current directory
  -M, --mtime <MTIME>              +/-n matches files modified more/less than n days ago , and n matches files modified exactly n days ago, days are rounded down.That is +n => (âˆ’âˆ‍, currâˆ’(n+1)), n => [currâˆ’(n+1), currâˆ’n), and -n => (ً‌‘گً‌‘¢ً‌‘ںً‌‘ںâˆ’ً‌‘›, +âˆ‍)
  -A, --atime <ATIME>              just like -mtime, but based on file access time
  -y, --ctime <CTIME>              just like -mtime, but based on file change time
      --files0-from <FILES0_FROM>  run dust on NUL-terminated file names specified in file; if argument is -, then read names from standard input
      --collapse <COLLAPSE>        Keep these directories collapsed
  -m, --filetime <FILETIME>        Directory 'size' is max filetime of child files instead of disk size. while a/c/m for last accessed/changed/modified time [possible values: a, c, m]
  -h, --help                       Print help (see more with '--help')
  -V, --version                    Print version

#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail

# generate-lean-variants.sh
# Generates lean variants of MyConvergio agents by stripping verbose sections
# Usage: ./generate-lean-variants.sh [agent-file.md] or ./generate-lean-variants.sh --all

AGENTS_DIR=".claude/agents"
SCRIPT_DIR="$(cd "$(dirname "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}")" && pwd)"
PROJECT_ROOT="$(cd "$SCRIPT_DIR/.." && pwd)"

# Colors
RED='\033[0;31m'
GREEN='\033[0;32m'
YELLOW='\033[1;33m'
BLUE='\033[0;34m'
NC='\033[0m' # No Color

log_info() {
    echo -e "${BLUE}[INFO]${NC} $1"
}

log_success() {
    echo -e "${GREEN}[SUCCESS]${NC} $1"
}

log_warning() {
    echo -e "${YELLOW}[WARNING]${NC} $1"
}

log_error() {
    echo -e "${RED}[ERROR]${NC} $1"
}

# Function to generate lean variant
generate_lean() {
    local input_file="$1"
    local output_file="${input_file%.md}.lean.md"
    
    log_info "Processing: $input_file"
    
    if [[ ! -f "$input_file" ]]; then
        log_error "File not found: $input_file"
        return 1
    fi
    
    # Check if already a lean variant
    if [[ "$input_file" == *.lean.md ]]; then
        log_warning "Skipping: already a lean variant"
        return 0
    fi
    
    # Create lean version using awk
    awk '
        BEGIN {
            in_security = 0
            in_copyright = 0
            in_example = 0
            skip_next_blank = 0
            printed_something = 0
        }
        
        # Detect Security & Ethics Framework section
        /^## Security & Ethics Framework/ {
            in_security = 1
            next
        }
        
        # Detect Copyright section
        /^<!--$/ {
            getline
            if (/Copyright \(c\)/) {
                in_copyright = 1
                next
            }
        }
        
        # End copyright section
        /^-->$/ && in_copyright {
            in_copyright = 0
            skip_next_blank = 1
            next
        }
        
        # Detect end of Security Framework (next ## heading)
        /^## / && in_security && !/^## Security & Ethics Framework/ {
            in_security = 0
            skip_next_blank = 0
        }
        
        # Detect Example sections in description
        /Example:/ && NR < 20 {
            in_example = 1
            next
        }
        
        # End example in frontmatter
        /^tools:/ || /^color:/ || /^model:/ {
            in_example = 0
        }
        
        # Skip blank line after removed section
        /^$/ && skip_next_blank {
            skip_next_blank = 0
            next
        }
        
        # Skip lines in removed sections
        in_security || in_copyright || in_example {
            next
        }
        
        # Print everything else
        {
            print
            printed_something = 1
        }
    ' "$input_file" > "$output_file"
    
    # Verify output was created and has content
    if [[ ! -s "$output_file" ]]; then
        log_error "Failed to generate lean variant (empty output)"
        rm -f "$output_file"
        return 1
    fi
    
    # Calculate size reduction
    original_size=$(wc -c < "$input_file")
    lean_size=$(wc -c < "$output_file")
    reduction=$(( 100 - (lean_size * 100 / original_size) ))
    
    log_success "Created: $output_file (${reduction}% smaller)"
    
    return 0
}

# Main execution
main() {
    cd "$PROJECT_ROOT"
    
    if [[ $# -eq 0 ]] || [[ "$1" == "--all" ]]; then
        log_info "Generating lean variants for all agents..."
        
        # Find all agent files (excluding already lean variants)
        find "$AGENTS_DIR" -name "*.md" -not -name "*.lean.md" -not -name "CONSTITUTION.md" -not -name "CommonValuesAndPrinciples.md" -not -name "MICROSOFT_VALUES.md" -not -name "SECURITY_FRAMEWORK_TEMPLATE.md" | while read -r agent_file; do
            generate_lean "$agent_file"
        done
        
        log_success "Lean variant generation complete"
    else
        # Process single file
        generate_lean "$1"
    fi
}

main "$@"

#!/usr/bin/env bash

# MyConvergio Selective Installation Script
# Allows modular installation with tier, variant, and rules selection

set -euo pipefail

SCRIPT_DIR="$(cd "$(dirname "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}")" && pwd)"
PROJECT_ROOT="$(cd "$SCRIPT_DIR/.." && pwd)"
CONFIG_FILE="$SCRIPT_DIR/install-config.json"

# Colors
RED='\033[0;31m'
GREEN='\033[0;32m'
YELLOW='\033[1;33m'
BLUE='\033[0;34m'
NC='\033[0m' # No Color

# Default values
TIER="${TIER:-standard}"
VARIANT="${VARIANT:-full}"
RULES="${RULES:-consolidated}"
TARGET_DIR="${TARGET_DIR:-$HOME/.claude}"
CATEGORIES="${CATEGORIES:-}"
AGENTS="${AGENTS:-}"

# Helper functions
info() { echo -e "${BLUE}â„¹${NC} $*"; }
success() { echo -e "${GREEN}âœ“${NC} $*"; }
warn() { echo -e "${YELLOW}âڑ ${NC} $*"; }
error() { echo -e "${RED}âœ—${NC} $*" >&2; }

usage() {
  cat << EOF
Usage: $0 [OPTIONS]

Modular installation for MyConvergio agents with context optimization.

OPTIONS:
  -t, --tier TIER           Installation tier: minimal|standard|full (default: standard)
  -v, --variant VARIANT     Agent variant: lean|full (default: full)
  -r, --rules RULES         Rules system: consolidated|detailed|none (default: consolidated)
  -d, --target-dir DIR      Target installation directory (default: ~/.claude)
  -c, --categories CATS     Comma-separated categories to install
  -a, --agents AGENTS       Comma-separated agent names to install
  -l, --list                List available tiers, categories, and agents
  -h, --help                Show this help message

EXAMPLES:
  # Install standard tier with lean agents and consolidated rules
  $0 --tier standard --variant lean --rules consolidated

  # Install only technical development category
  $0 --categories technical_development

  # Install specific agents
  $0 --agents baccio,dario,rex,thor

  # Install minimal tier to custom directory
  $0 --tier minimal --target-dir ./my-claude-agents

  # List all available options
  $0 --list

CONTEXT OPTIMIZATION:
  - Tier minimal:      ~50KB  context (5 agents)
  - Tier standard:     ~200KB context (20 agents)
  - Tier full:         ~600KB context (57 agents)

  - Variant lean:      50% smaller (no Security Framework)
  - Variant full:      Complete documentation

  - Rules consolidated: 93% smaller (3.6KB)
  - Rules detailed:     Full examples (52KB)

For more information: https://github.com/Roberdan/MyConvergio
EOF
  exit 0
}

list_options() {
  info "Available Tiers:"
  jq -r '.tiers | to_entries[] | "  \(.key): \(.value.description)"' "$CONFIG_FILE"

  echo ""
  info "Available Categories:"
  find "$PROJECT_ROOT/.claude/agents" -mindepth 1 -maxdepth 1 -type d -exec basename {} \; | sort

  echo ""
  info "Available Variants:"
  jq -r '.variants | to_entries[] | "  \(.key): \(.value.description)"' "$CONFIG_FILE"

  echo ""
  info "Available Rules:"
  jq -r '.rules | to_entries[] | "  \(.key): \(.value.description)"' "$CONFIG_FILE"

  exit 0
}

get_agents_for_tier() {
  local tier=$1
  jq -r --arg tier "$tier" '.tiers[$tier].agents | if type == "array" then .[] else . end' "$CONFIG_FILE"
}

get_categories_for_tier() {
  local tier=$1
  local cats=$(jq -r --arg tier "$tier" '.tiers[$tier].categories | if type == "array" then .[] else . end' "$CONFIG_FILE")

  if [ "$cats" = "all" ]; then
    find "$PROJECT_ROOT/.claude/agents" -mindepth 1 -maxdepth 1 -type d -exec basename {} \; | sort
  else
    echo "$cats"
  fi
}

install_agent() {
  local agent_file=$1
  local target_category=$2

  local agent_name=$(basename "$agent_file" .md | sed 's/\.lean$//')
  local target_path="$TARGET_DIR/agents/$target_category"

  mkdir -p "$target_path"

  if [ "$VARIANT" = "lean" ]; then
    # Check if lean variant exists
    local lean_file="${agent_file%.md}.lean.md"
    if [ -f "$lean_file" ]; then
      cp "$lean_file" "$target_path/$agent_name.md"
      success "Installed $agent_name (lean) â†’ $target_category/"
    else
      warn "Lean variant not found for $agent_name, installing full version"
      cp "$agent_file" "$target_path/$agent_name.md"
      success "Installed $agent_name (full) â†’ $target_category/"
    fi
  else
    cp "$agent_file" "$target_path/$agent_name.md"
    success "Installed $agent_name â†’ $target_category/"
  fi
}

install_category() {
  local category=$1
  local category_path="$PROJECT_ROOT/.claude/agents/$category"

  if [ ! -d "$category_path" ]; then
    error "Category not found: $category"
    return 1
  fi

  info "Installing category: $category"
  local count=0

  for agent_file in "$category_path"/*.md; do
    [ -f "$agent_file" ] || continue
    [[ "$(basename "$agent_file")" =~ \.lean\.md$ ]] && continue

    install_agent "$agent_file" "$category"
    ((count++))
  done

  success "Installed $count agents from $category"
}

install_rules() {
  local rules_type=$1

  if [ "$rules_type" = "none" ]; then
    info "Skipping rules installation (none selected)"
    return 0
  fi

  info "Installing rules: $rules_type"
  mkdir -p "$TARGET_DIR/rules"

  local files=$(jq -r --arg type "$rules_type" '.rules[$type].files[]' "$CONFIG_FILE")
  local count=0

  for file in $files; do
    local source_file="$PROJECT_ROOT/.claude/rules/$file"
    if [ -f "$source_file" ]; then
      cp "$source_file" "$TARGET_DIR/rules/$(basename "$file")"
      success "Installed rule: $(basename "$file")"
      ((count++))
    else
      warn "Rule file not found: $file"
    fi
  done

  success "Installed $count rule files"
}

# Parse arguments
while [[ $# -gt 0 ]]; do
  case $1 in
    -t|--tier)
      TIER="$2"
      shift 2
      ;;
    -v|--variant)
      VARIANT="$2"
      shift 2
      ;;
    -r|--rules)
      RULES="$2"
      shift 2
      ;;
    -d|--target-dir)
      TARGET_DIR="$2"
      shift 2
      ;;
    -c|--categories)
      CATEGORIES="$2"
      shift 2
      ;;
    -a|--agents)
      AGENTS="$2"
      shift 2
      ;;
    -l|--list)
      list_options
      ;;
    -h|--help)
      usage
      ;;
    *)
      error "Unknown option: $1"
      usage
      ;;
  esac
done

# Main installation logic
info "MyConvergio Selective Installation"
info "Configuration:"
echo "  Target: $TARGET_DIR"
echo "  Tier: $TIER"
echo "  Variant: $VARIANT"
echo "  Rules: $RULES"

# Validate tier
if ! jq -e --arg tier "$TIER" '.tiers[$tier]' "$CONFIG_FILE" > /dev/null 2>&1; then
  error "Invalid tier: $TIER"
  info "Available tiers: minimal, standard, full"
  exit 1
fi

# Create target directory structure
mkdir -p "$TARGET_DIR/agents"
mkdir -p "$TARGET_DIR/rules"

# Install agents based on selection
if [ -n "$AGENTS" ]; then
  # Install specific agents
  info "Installing specific agents: $AGENTS"
  IFS=',' read -ra AGENT_LIST <<< "$AGENTS"
  for agent_name in "${AGENT_LIST[@]}"; do
    agent_name=$(echo "$agent_name" | xargs) # trim whitespace

    # Find agent file across all categories
    local found=false
    for category in "$PROJECT_ROOT/.claude/agents"/*; do
      [ -d "$category" ] || continue
      local agent_file="$category/$agent_name.md"
      if [ -f "$agent_file" ]; then
        install_agent "$agent_file" "$(basename "$category")"
        found=true
        break
      fi
    done

    if [ "$found" = false ]; then
      warn "Agent not found: $agent_name"
    fi
  done
elif [ -n "$CATEGORIES" ]; then
  # Install specific categories
  IFS=',' read -ra CAT_LIST <<< "$CATEGORIES"
  for category in "${CAT_LIST[@]}"; do
    category=$(echo "$category" | xargs) # trim whitespace
    install_category "$category"
  done
else
  # Install tier
  info "Installing tier: $TIER"

  local tier_cats=$(get_categories_for_tier "$TIER")
  for category in $tier_cats; do
    install_category "$category"
  done
fi

# Install rules
install_rules "$RULES"

success "Installation complete!"
info "Agents installed to: $TARGET_DIR/agents/"
info "Rules installed to: $TARGET_DIR/rules/"

# Show summary
echo ""
info "Installation Summary:"
local agent_count=$(find "$TARGET_DIR/agents" -name "*.md" -type f | wc -l | xargs)
local rules_count=$(find "$TARGET_DIR/rules" -name "*.md" -type f 2>/dev/null | wc -l | xargs)
echo "  Agents: $agent_count"
echo "  Rules: $rules_count"
echo "  Variant: $VARIANT"

# Estimate context size
local context_size="unknown"
case "$TIER" in
  minimal)
    context_size="~50KB"
    ;;
  standard)
    context_size="~200KB"
    ;;
  full)
    context_size="~600KB"
    ;;
esac

if [ "$VARIANT" = "lean" ]; then
  context_size="$context_size (lean: ~50% smaller)"
fi

echo "  Estimated context: $context_size"

#!/usr/bin/env bash

# MyConvergio Selective Installation Script
# Allows modular installation with tier, variant, and rules selection

set -euo pipefail

SCRIPT_DIR="$(cd "$(dirname "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}")" && pwd)"
PROJECT_ROOT="$(cd "$SCRIPT_DIR/.." && pwd)"
CONFIG_FILE="$SCRIPT_DIR/install-config.json"

# Colors
RED='\033[0;31m'
GREEN='\033[0;32m'
YELLOW='\033[1;33m'
BLUE='\033[0;34m'
NC='\033[0m' # No Color

# Default values
TIER="${TIER:-standard}"
VARIANT="${VARIANT:-full}"
RULES="${RULES:-consolidated}"
TARGET_DIR="${TARGET_DIR:-$HOME/.claude}"
CATEGORIES="${CATEGORIES:-}"
AGENTS="${AGENTS:-}"

# Helper functions
info() { echo -e "${BLUE}â„¹${NC} $*"; }
success() { echo -e "${GREEN}âœ“${NC} $*"; }
warn() { echo -e "${YELLOW}âڑ ${NC} $*"; }
error() { echo -e "${RED}âœ—${NC} $*" >&2; }

usage() {
  cat << EOF
Usage: $0 [OPTIONS]

Modular installation for MyConvergio agents with context optimization.

OPTIONS:
  -t, --tier TIER           Installation tier: minimal|standard|full (default: standard)
  -v, --variant VARIANT     Agent variant: lean|full (default: full)
  -r, --rules RULES         Rules system: consolidated|detailed|none (default: consolidated)
  -d, --target-dir DIR      Target installation directory (default: ~/.claude)
  -c, --categories CATS     Comma-separated categories to install
  -a, --agents AGENTS       Comma-separated agent names to install
  -l, --list                List available tiers, categories, and agents
  -h, --help                Show this help message

EXAMPLES:
  # Install standard tier with lean agents and consolidated rules
  $0 --tier standard --variant lean --rules consolidated

  # Install only technical development category
  $0 --categories technical_development

  # Install specific agents
  $0 --agents baccio,dario,rex,thor

  # Install minimal tier to custom directory
  $0 --tier minimal --target-dir ./my-claude-agents

  # List all available options
  $0 --list

CONTEXT OPTIMIZATION:
  - Tier minimal:      ~50KB  context (5 agents)
  - Tier standard:     ~200KB context (20 agents)
  - Tier full:         ~600KB context (57 agents)

  - Variant lean:      50% smaller (no Security Framework)
  - Variant full:      Complete documentation

  - Rules consolidated: 93% smaller (3.6KB)
  - Rules detailed:     Full examples (52KB)

For more information: https://github.com/Roberdan/MyConvergio
EOF
  exit 0
}

list_options() {
  info "Available Tiers:"
  jq -r '.tiers | to_entries[] | "  \(.key): \(.value.description)"' "$CONFIG_FILE"

  echo ""
  info "Available Categories:"
  find "$PROJECT_ROOT/.claude/agents" -mindepth 1 -maxdepth 1 -type d -exec basename {} \; | sort

  echo ""
  info "Available Variants:"
  jq -r '.variants | to_entries[] | "  \(.key): \(.value.description)"' "$CONFIG_FILE"

  echo ""
  info "Available Rules:"
  jq -r '.rules | to_entries[] | "  \(.key): \(.value.description)"' "$CONFIG_FILE"

  exit 0
}

get_agents_for_tier() {
  local tier=$1
  jq -r --arg tier "$tier" '.tiers[$tier].agents | if type == "array" then .[] else . end' "$CONFIG_FILE"
}

get_categories_for_tier() {
  local tier=$1
  local cats=$(jq -r --arg tier "$tier" '.tiers[$tier].categories | if type == "array" then .[] else . end' "$CONFIG_FILE")

  if [ "$cats" = "all" ]; then
    find "$PROJECT_ROOT/.claude/agents" -mindepth 1 -maxdepth 1 -type d -exec basename {} \; | sort
  else
    echo "$cats"
  fi
}

install_agent() {
  local agent_file=$1
  local target_category=$2

  local agent_name=$(basename "$agent_file" .md | sed 's/\.lean$//')
  local target_path="$TARGET_DIR/agents/$target_category"

  mkdir -p "$target_path"

  if [ "$VARIANT" = "lean" ]; then
    # Check if lean variant exists
    local lean_file="${agent_file%.md}.lean.md"
    if [ -f "$lean_file" ]; then
      cp "$lean_file" "$target_path/$agent_name.md"
      success "Installed $agent_name (lean) â†’ $target_category/"
    else
      warn "Lean variant not found for $agent_name, installing full version"
      cp "$agent_file" "$target_path/$agent_name.md"
      success "Installed $agent_name (full) â†’ $target_category/"
    fi
  else
    cp "$agent_file" "$target_path/$agent_name.md"
    success "Installed $agent_name â†’ $target_category/"
  fi
}

install_category() {
  local category=$1
  local category_path="$PROJECT_ROOT/.claude/agents/$category"

  if [ ! -d "$category_path" ]; then
    error "Category not found: $category"
    return 1
  fi

  info "Installing category: $category"
  local count=0

  for agent_file in "$category_path"/*.md; do
    [ -f "$agent_file" ] || continue
    [[ "$(basename "$agent_file")" =~ \.lean\.md$ ]] && continue

    install_agent "$agent_file" "$category"
    ((count++))
  done

  success "Installed $count agents from $category"
}

install_rules() {
  local rules_type=$1

  if [ "$rules_type" = "none" ]; then
    info "Skipping rules installation (none selected)"
    return 0
  fi

  info "Installing rules: $rules_type"
  mkdir -p "$TARGET_DIR/rules"

  local files=$(jq -r --arg type "$rules_type" '.rules[$type].files[]' "$CONFIG_FILE")
  local count=0

  for file in $files; do
    local source_file="$PROJECT_ROOT/.claude/rules/$file"
    if [ -f "$source_file" ]; then
      cp "$source_file" "$TARGET_DIR/rules/$(basename "$file")"
      success "Installed rule: $(basename "$file")"
      ((count++))
    else
      warn "Rule file not found: $file"
    fi
  done

  success "Installed $count rule files"
}

# Parse arguments
while [[ $# -gt 0 ]]; do
  case $1 in
    -t|--tier)
      TIER="$2"
      shift 2
      ;;
    -v|--variant)
      VARIANT="$2"
      shift 2
      ;;
    -r|--rules)
      RULES="$2"
      shift 2
      ;;
    -d|--target-dir)
      TARGET_DIR="$2"
      shift 2
      ;;
    -c|--categories)
      CATEGORIES="$2"
      shift 2
      ;;
    -a|--agents)
      AGENTS="$2"
      shift 2
      ;;
    -l|--list)
      list_options
      ;;
    -h|--help)
      usage
      ;;
    *)
      error "Unknown option: $1"
      usage
      ;;
  esac
done

# Main installation logic
info "MyConvergio Selective Installation"
info "Configuration:"
echo "  Target: $TARGET_DIR"
echo "  Tier: $TIER"
echo "  Variant: $VARIANT"
echo "  Rules: $RULES"

# Validate tier
if ! jq -e --arg tier "$TIER" '.tiers[$tier]' "$CONFIG_FILE" > /dev/null 2>&1; then
  error "Invalid tier: $TIER"
  info "Available tiers: minimal, standard, full"
  exit 1
fi

# Create target directory structure
mkdir -p "$TARGET_DIR/agents"
mkdir -p "$TARGET_DIR/rules"

# Install agents based on selection
if [ -n "$AGENTS" ]; then
  # Install specific agents
  info "Installing specific agents: $AGENTS"
  IFS=',' read -ra AGENT_LIST <<< "$AGENTS"
  for agent_name in "${AGENT_LIST[@]}"; do
    agent_name=$(echo "$agent_name" | xargs) # trim whitespace

    # Find agent file across all categories
    local found=false
    for category in "$PROJECT_ROOT/.claude/agents"/*; do
      [ -d "$category" ] || continue

        found=true
        break
      fi
    done

    if [ "$found" = false ]; then
      warn "Agent not found: $agent_name"
    fi
  done
elif [ -n "$CATEGORIES" ]; then
  # Install specific categories
  IFS=',' read -ra CAT_LIST <<< "$CATEGORIES"
  for category in "${CAT_LIST[@]}"; do
    category=$(echo "$category" | xargs) # trim whitespace
    install_category "$category"
  done
else
  # Install tier
  info "Installing tier: $TIER"

  local tier_cats=$(get_categories_for_tier "$TIER")
  for category in $tier_cats; do
    install_category "$category"
  done
fi

# Install rules
install_rules "$RULES"

success "Installation complete!"
info "Agents installed to: $TARGET_DIR/agents/"
info "Rules installed to: $TARGET_DIR/rules/"

# Show summary
echo ""
info "Installation Summary:"
local agent_count=$(find "$TARGET_DIR/agents" -name "*.md" -type f | wc -l | xargs)
local rules_count=$(find "$TARGET_DIR/rules" -name "*.md" -type f 2>/dev/null | wc -l | xargs)
echo "  Agents: $agent_count"
echo "  Rules: $rules_count"
echo "  Variant: $VARIANT"

# Estimate context size
local context_size="unknown"
case "$TIER" in
  minimal)
    context_size="~50KB"
    ;;
  standard)
    context_size="~200KB"
    ;;
  full)
    context_size="~600KB"
    ;;
esac

## Analisi Ottimizzazioni Context - Roberto's Setup

### 1. RULES: Consolidamento Massivo âœ…

**Hai fatto un'ottimizzazione BRUTALE e INTELLIGENTE:**

| Stato | File | Bytes | Contenuto |
|-------|------|-------|-----------|
| **ARCHIVIATO** | api-development.md | 10,735 | API standards completi |

| **ATTIVO** | engineering-standards.md | 3,619 | **TUTTO CONSOLIDATO** |

**Risparmio Context: 52,000 bytes â†’ 3,600 bytes = -93% ًں”¥**

### 2. AGENTS: Lean Versions âœ…

**Hai creato versioni stripped per uso personale:**

| Agente | MyConvergio | Local (~/.claude) | Differenza |
|--------|-------------|-------------------|------------|
| dario | v1.0.2 (full) | v1.1.0 (lean) | -50% security framework |
| otto | v1.0.2 (full) | v1.1.0 (lean) | -50% security framework |
| paolo | v1.0.2 (full) | v1.1.0 (lean) | -50% security framework |
| thor | v2.0.0 (full) | v2.1.0 (lean) | -50% security framework |

### 3. SKILLS: Archiviati âœ…

**Hai rimosso skill pesanti non usate:**
- orchestration (2.2k)
- project-management (12k)
- strategic-analysis (11k)

**Risparmio: ~25KB**

### 4. SETTINGS: Performance Tuning âœ…

```json
{
  "CLAUDE_CODE_MAX_OUTPUT_TOKENS": "64000",
  "MAX_THINKING_TOKENS": "31999",
  "CLAUDE_CODE_DISABLE_NONESSENTIAL_TRAFFIC": "1",
  "NODE_OPTIONS": "--max-old-space-size=16384"
}
```

---

## Proposta v3.7.0: "Context Optimization & Selective Install"

### ًںژ¯ Obiettivo
Portare le tue ottimizzazioni in MyConvergio ma mantenendo backward compatibility e dando agli utenti la **scelta del livello di context**.

### ًں“¦ Nuove Feature

#### 1. **Selective Agent Installation (TIER SYSTEM)**

```bash
# Installazione per tier
make install-tier-essential    # 7 agenti core (ali, baccio, thor, dario, rex, otto, marco)
make install-tier-technical    # + agenti technical (7 + 7 = 14 totali)
make install-tier-business     # + agenti business (14 + 11 = 25 totali)
make install-tier-full         # Tutti i 57 agenti

# Installazione custom
make install-custom AGENTS="ali,baccio,thor,dario"
```

**Tiers proposti:**
- **Essential** (7): ali, baccio, thor, dario, rex, otto, marco - per sviluppo daily
- **Technical** (+7): paolo, dr-enzo, luca, guardian, app/feature-release-managers
- **Business** (+11): business_operations/*
- **Specialized** (+13): specialized_experts/*
- **Leadership** (+7): leadership_strategy/*
- **Full** (57): Tutto

#### 2. **Rules: Lean vs Detailed Mode**

```bash
# Durante installazione
make install RULES=lean        # engineering-standards.md (3.6k)
make install RULES=detailed    # Tutti i 6 file separati (52k)
make install RULES=none        # Nessuna rule (usa solo CLAUDE.md)
```

**File structure:**
```
.claude/rules/
â”œâ”€â”€ engineering-standards.md     # Lean version (default)
â””â”€â”€ detailed/                    # Optional install
    â”œâ”€â”€ api-development.md
    â”œâ”€â”€ code-style.md
    â”œâ”€â”€ documentation-standards.md
    â”œâ”€â”€ ethical-guidelines.md
    â”œâ”€â”€ security-requirements.md
    â””â”€â”€ testing-standards.md
```

#### 3. **Agent Variants: Full vs Lean**

```bash
make install-agents VARIANT=lean    # Stripped versions (-50% context)
make install-agents VARIANT=full    # Con Security Framework completo
```

**Lean variant:**
- Rimuove Security & Ethics Framework esteso
- Rimuove Examples nella description
- Mantiene Identity Lock minimal
- Copyright notice minimal

**Generazione automatica:**
```bash
./scripts/generate-lean-agents.sh    # Crea variants da full
```

#### 4. **Skills: Optional Install**

```bash
make install-skills               # Tutti gli 8 skills
make install-skills-essential     # Solo code-review, debugging, architecture
make install-skills-none          # Nessun skill
```

#### 5. **Context Profiler**

```bash
./scripts/context-profiler.sh

# Output:
MyConvergio Context Usage Report
================================
Agents:        57 files    â†’  850KB  (Full) / 425KB (Lean)
Rules:         6 files     â†’   52KB  (Detailed) / 3.6KB (Lean)
Skills:        8 skills    â†’   35KB
CLAUDE.md:     1 file      â†’    8KB
--------------------------------
Total Context: Full Setup  â†’  945KB
Total Context: Lean Setup  â†’  471KB (-50%)

Recommendation: Use TIER=technical + RULES=lean for daily work
```

### ًں“‌ Documentazione Nuova

**`docs/CONTEXT_OPTIMIZATION.md`** (nuovo file):
```markdown
# Context Optimization Guide

## TL;DR
```bash
# Recommended for daily development (Roberto's setup)
make install TIER=technical RULES=lean VARIANT=lean

# Full professional distribution
make install TIER=full RULES=detailed VARIANT=full
```

## Strategy

### Rules Consolidation
[Spiega la strategia lean vs detailed]

### Agent Variants
[Spiega full vs lean]

### Tier System
[Spiega i tier e quando usarli]

## Measuring Context
[Come misurare e ottimizzare]
```

### ًں”„ Backward Compatibility

**Default behavior = NESSUN BREAKING CHANGE:**
```bash
make install    # Installa TUTTO come prima (tier=full, rules=detailed, variant=full)
```

Solo chi vuole ottimizzare usa i nuovi parametri.

### ًں“‹ Implementation Plan

```bash
# Wave 1: Infrastructure (2h)
- scripts/generate-lean-agents.sh
- scripts/context-profiler.sh

**B. Agents Lean Variants**
- Thor 2.0.0 â†’ 2.1.0 (stripped Security Framework)

- Otto 1.0.2 â†’ 1.1.0 (stripped examples + framework)
- Paolo 1.0.2 â†’ 1.1.0 (stripped examples + framework)
- **Risparmio per agent: ~50% token**

**C. Skills Archived**
- `orchestration/` (2.2 KB)
- `project-management/` (12 KB)
- `strategic-analysis/` (11 KB)
- **Risparmio totale: 25.2 KB**

**D. Settings Optimization**
```json
{
  "CLAUDE_CODE_MAX_OUTPUT_TOKENS": "64000",
  "MAX_THINKING_TOKENS": "31999",
  "CLAUDE_CODE_DISABLE_NONESSENTIAL_TRAFFIC": "1"
}
```

### 2. IMPATTO CONTEXT

**Totale Risparmiato:**
- Rules: 47 KB
- Skills: 25 KB
- Agents (4 أ— 50%): ~40 KB stimato
- **TOTALE: ~112 KB (~28,000 tokens)**

### 3. STRATEGIA PER MYCONVERGIO v3.7.0

**NON fare release tradizionale, ma implementare sistema modulare:**

#### A. Install Tiers (Selettivi)
```bash
# Makefile targets
make install-minimal    # Core only (Constitution, Values, Strategic Planner)
make install-technical  # + Technical agents (lean variants)

```

#### B. Rules System (Dual Mode)

    â”œâ”€â”€ security-requirements.md (6.2 KB)
    â””â”€â”€ testing-standards.md     (7.5 KB)
```

**Default: `lean/`, utenti possono scegliere `detailed/`**

#### C. Agent Variants
```

```

#!/bin/bash
# MyConvergio Selective Installation System
# Version: 1.0.0

set -e

AGENTS_SRC=".claude/agents"
AGENTS_LEAN=".claude/agents-lean"
RULES_SRC=".claude/rules"
RULES_CONSOLIDATED=".claude/rules/consolidated"
CLAUDE_HOME="$HOME/.claude"

# Colors
GREEN='\033[0;32m'
BLUE='\033[0;34m'
YELLOW='\033[1;33m'
NC='\033[0m'

show_menu() {
    echo -e "${BLUE}â•”â•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•—${NC}"
    echo -e "${BLUE}â•‘  MyConvergio Installation Selector v3.7   â•‘${NC}"
    echo -e "${BLUE}â•ڑâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•‌${NC}"
    echo ""
    echo "Select installation mode:"
    echo ""
    echo "  1) Minimal (Core agents only - ~50KB)"
    echo "     â†’ 8 agents: ali, thor, baccio, rex, dario, otto, app-release, feature-release"
    echo ""
    echo "  2) Standard (Essential agents - ~200KB)"
    echo "     â†’ 20 agents: Minimal + technical + leadership + compliance"
    echo ""
    echo "  3) Full (All 57 agents - ~800KB)"
    echo "     â†’ Complete ecosystem"
    echo ""
    echo "  4) Lean (Full agents with stripped Security Frameworks - ~400KB)"
    echo "     â†’ All agents but with optimized size"
    echo ""
    echo "  5) Custom (Interactive selection)"
    echo "     â†’ Choose individual agents"
    echo ""
    echo "  6) Rules Only (No agents)"
    echo "     â†’ Install rules/skills only"
    echo ""
    read -p "Enter choice [1-6]: " choice
    echo ""
}

install_minimal() {
    echo -e "${BLUE}Installing Minimal (Core agents)...${NC}"

    CORE_AGENTS=(
        "leadership_strategy/ali-chief-of-staff.md"
        "core_utility/thor-quality-assurance-guardian.md"
        "technical_development/baccio-tech-architect.md"
        "technical_development/rex-code-reviewer.md"
        "technical_development/dario-debugger.md"
        "technical_development/otto-performance-optimizer.md"
        "release_management/app-release-manager.md"
        "release_management/feature-release-manager.md"
    )

    mkdir -p "$CLAUDE_HOME/agents"

    for agent in "${CORE_AGENTS[@]}"; do
        cp "$AGENTS_SRC/$agent" "$CLAUDE_HOME/agents/$(basename $agent)"
        echo -e "  ${GREEN}âœ“${NC} $(basename $agent .md)"
    done

    # Copy Constitution (always needed)
    cp -r "$AGENTS_SRC/core_utility" "$CLAUDE_HOME/agents/"

    echo ""
    echo -e "${GREEN}âœ… Installed 8 core agents${NC}"
}

install_standard() {
    echo -e "${BLUE}Installing Standard (Essential agents)...${NC}"

    CATEGORIES=(
        "leadership_strategy"
        "technical_development"
        "release_management"
        "compliance_legal"
        "core_utility"
    )

    mkdir -p "$CLAUDE_HOME/agents"

    for cat in "${CATEGORIES[@]}"; do
        if [ -d "$AGENTS_SRC/$cat" ]; then
            mkdir -p "$CLAUDE_HOME/agents/$cat"
            cp -r "$AGENTS_SRC/$cat"/* "$CLAUDE_HOME/agents/$cat/"
        fi
    done

    COUNT=$(find "$CLAUDE_HOME/agents" -name '*.md' ! -name 'CONSTITUTION.md' ! -name '*.md' -type f | wc -l | tr -d ' ')
    echo ""
    echo -e "${GREEN}âœ… Installed $COUNT agents${NC}"
}

install_full() {
    echo -e "${BLUE}Installing Full (All 57 agents)...${NC}"

    mkdir -p "$CLAUDE_HOME/agents"
    cp -r "$AGENTS_SRC"/* "$CLAUDE_HOME/agents/"

    COUNT=$(find "$CLAUDE_HOME/agents" -name '*.md' ! -name 'CONSTITUTION.md' -type f | wc -l | tr -d ' ')
    echo ""
    echo -e "${GREEN}âœ… Installed $COUNT agents${NC}"
}

install_lean() {
    echo -e "${BLUE}Installing Lean (Optimized agents)...${NC}"

    if [ ! -d "$AGENTS_LEAN" ]; then
        echo -e "${YELLOW}âڑ ï¸ڈ  Lean agents not yet available. Using full agents.${NC}"
        install_full
        return
    fi

    mkdir -p "$CLAUDE_HOME/agents"
    cp -r "$AGENTS_LEAN"/* "$CLAUDE_HOME/agents/"

    COUNT=$(find "$CLAUDE_HOME/agents" -name '*.md' -type f | wc -l | tr -d ' ')
    echo ""
    echo -e "${GREEN}âœ… Installed $COUNT lean agents${NC}"
}

install_rules() {
    echo ""
    echo "Select rules mode:"
    echo "  1) Consolidated (Single file - 3.6KB)"
    echo "  2) Detailed (6 separate files - 52KB)"
    echo "  3) Both"
    read -p "Enter choice [1-3]: " rules_choice

    mkdir -p "$CLAUDE_HOME/rules"

    case $rules_choice in
        1)
            cp "$RULES_CONSOLIDATED/engineering-standards.md" "$CLAUDE_HOME/rules/"
            echo -e "  ${GREEN}âœ“${NC} Consolidated rules"
            ;;
        2)
            cp "$RULES_SRC"/*.md "$CLAUDE_HOME/rules/" 2>/dev/null || true
            echo -e "  ${GREEN}âœ“${NC} Detailed rules"
            ;;
        3)
            cp "$RULES_CONSOLIDATED/engineering-standards.md" "$CLAUDE_HOME/rules/"
            cp "$RULES_SRC"/*.md "$CLAUDE_HOME/rules/" 2>/dev/null || true
            echo -e "  ${GREEN}âœ“${NC} Both rule sets"
            ;;
    esac
}

install_skills() {
    if [ -d ".claude/skills" ]; then
        echo ""
        read -p "Install skills? [y/N]: " install_skills
        if [[ $install_skills =~ ^[Yy]$ ]]; then
            mkdir -p "$CLAUDE_HOME/skills"
            cp -r .claude/skills/* "$CLAUDE_HOME/skills/"
            echo -e "  ${GREEN}âœ“${NC} Skills installed"
        fi
    fi
}

show_summary() {
    echo ""
    echo -e "${BLUE}Installation Summary:${NC}"

    if [ -d "$CLAUDE_HOME/agents" ]; then
        AGENT_COUNT=$(find "$CLAUDE_HOME/agents" -name '*.md' ! -name 'CONSTITUTION.md' ! -name 'CommonValuesAndPrinciples.md' -type f | wc -l | tr -d ' ')
        AGENT_SIZE=$(du -sh "$CLAUDE_HOME/agents" 2>/dev/null | awk '{print $1}')
        echo "  Agents: $AGENT_COUNT ($AGENT_SIZE)"
    fi

    if [ -d "$CLAUDE_HOME/rules" ]; then
        RULES_COUNT=$(find "$CLAUDE_HOME/rules" -name '*.md' -type f | wc -l | tr -d ' ')
        RULES_SIZE=$(du -sh "$CLAUDE_HOME/rules" 2>/dev/null | awk '{print $1}')
        echo "  Rules:  $RULES_COUNT files ($RULES_SIZE)"
    fi

    if [ -d "$CLAUDE_HOME/skills" ]; then
        SKILLS_COUNT=$(find "$CLAUDE_HOME/skills" -type d -mindepth 1 -maxdepth 1 | wc -l | tr -d ' ')
        echo "  Skills: $SKILLS_COUNT"
    fi

    echo ""
    echo -e "${GREEN}âœ… Installation complete!${NC}"
    echo ""
    echo -e "${YELLOW}Tip:${NC} See docs/CONTEXT_OPTIMIZATION.md for usage tips"
}

main() {
    show_menu

    case $choice in
        1) install_minimal ;;
        2) install_standard ;;
        3) install_full ;;
        4) install_lean ;;
        5)
            echo -e "${YELLOW}Custom installation not yet implemented${NC}"
            exit 1
            ;;
        6)
            # Rules only
            ;;
        *)
            echo -e "${YELLOW}Invalid choice${NC}"
            exit 1
            ;;
    esac

    install_rules
    install_skills
    show_summary
}

main

#!/bin/bash
# MyConvergio Selective Installation System
# Version: 1.0.0

set -e

AGENTS_SRC=".claude/agents"
AGENTS_LEAN=".claude/agents-lean"
RULES_SRC=".claude/rules"
RULES_CONSOLIDATED=".claude/rules/consolidated"
CLAUDE_HOME="$HOME/.claude"

# Colors
GREEN='\033[0;32m'
BLUE='\033[0;34m'
YELLOW='\033[1;33m'
NC='\033[0m'

show_menu() {
    echo -e "${BLUE}â•”â•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•—${NC}"
    echo -e "${BLUE}â•‘  MyConvergio Installation Selector v3.7   â•‘${NC}"
    echo -e "${BLUE}â•ڑâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•گâ•‌${NC}"
    echo ""
    echo "Select installation mode:"
    echo ""
    echo "  1) Minimal (Core agents only - ~50KB)"
    echo "     â†’ 8 agents: ali, thor, baccio, rex, dario, otto, app-release, feature-release"
    echo ""
    echo "  2) Standard (Essential agents - ~200KB)"
    echo "     â†’ 20 agents: Minimal + technical + leadership + compliance"
    echo ""
    echo "  3) Full (All 57 agents - ~800KB)"
    echo "     â†’ Complete ecosystem"
    echo ""
    echo "  4) Lean (Full agents with stripped Security Frameworks - ~400KB)"
    echo "     â†’ All agents but with optimized size"
    echo ""
    echo "  5) Custom (Interactive selection)"
    echo "     â†’ Choose individual agents"
    echo ""
    echo "  6) Rules Only (No agents)"
    echo "     â†’ Install rules/skills only"
    echo ""
    read -p "Enter choice [1-6]: " choice
    echo ""
}

install_minimal() {
    echo -e "${BLUE}Installing Minimal (Core agents)...${NC}"

    CORE_AGENTS=(
        "leadership_strategy/ali-chief-of-staff.md"
        "core_utility/thor-quality-assurance-guardian.md"
        "technical_development/baccio-tech-architect.md"
        "technical_development/rex-code-reviewer.md"
        "technical_development/dario-debugger.md"
        "technical_development/otto-performance-optimizer.md"
        "release_management/app-release-manager.md"
        "release_management/feature-release-manager.md"
    )

    mkdir -p "$CLAUDE_HOME/agents"

    for agent in "${CORE_AGENTS[@]}"; do
        cp "$AGENTS_SRC/$agent" "$CLAUDE_HOME/agents/$(basename $agent)"
        echo -e "  ${GREEN}âœ“${NC} $(basename $agent .md)"
    done

    # Copy Constitution (always needed)
    cp -r "$AGENTS_SRC/core_utility" "$CLAUDE_HOME/agents/"

    echo ""
    echo -e "${GREEN}âœ… Installed 8 core agents${NC}"
}

install_standard() {
    echo -e "${BLUE}Installing Standard (Essential agents)...${NC}"

    CATEGORIES=(
        "leadership_strategy"
        "technical_development"
        "release_management"
        "compliance_legal"
        "core_utility"
    )

    mkdir -p "$CLAUDE_HOME/agents"

    for cat in "${CATEGORIES[@]}"; do
        if [ -d "$AGENTS_SRC/$cat" ]; then
            mkdir -p "$CLAUDE_HOME/agents/$cat"
            cp -r "$AGENTS_SRC/$cat"/* "$CLAUDE_HOME/agents/$cat/"
        fi
    done

    COUNT=$(find "$CLAUDE_HOME/agents" -name '*.md' ! -name 'CONSTITUTION.md' ! -name '*.md' -type f | wc -l | tr -d ' ')
    echo ""
    echo -e "${GREEN}âœ… Installed $COUNT agents${NC}"
}

install_full() {
    echo -e "${BLUE}Installing Full (All 57 agents)...${NC}"

    mkdir -p "$CLAUDE_HOME/agents"
    cp -r "$AGENTS_SRC"/* "$CLAUDE_HOME/agents/"

    COUNT=$(find "$CLAUDE_HOME/agents" -name '*.md' ! -name 'CONSTITUTION.md' -type f | wc -l | tr -d ' ')
    echo ""
    echo -e "${GREEN}âœ… Installed $COUNT agents${NC}"
}

install_lean() {
    echo -e "${BLUE}Installing Lean (Optimized agents)...${NC}"

    if [ ! -d "$AGENTS_LEAN" ]; then
        echo -e "${YELLOW}âڑ ï¸ڈ  Lean agents not yet available. Using full agents.${NC}"
        install_full
        return
    fi

    mkdir -p "$CLAUDE_HOME/agents"
    cp -r "$AGENTS_LEAN"/* "$CLAUDE_HOME/agents/"

    COUNT=$(find "$CLAUDE_HOME/agents" -name '*.md' -type f | wc -l | tr -d ' ')
    echo ""
    echo -e "${GREEN}âœ… Installed $COUNT lean agents${NC}"
}

install_rules() {
    echo ""
    echo "Select rules mode:"
    echo "  1) Consolidated (Single file - 3.6KB)"
    echo "  2) Detailed (6 separate files - 52KB)"
    echo "  3) Both"
    read -p "Enter choice [1-3]: " rules_choice

    mkdir -p "$CLAUDE_HOME/rules"

    case $rules_choice in
        1)
            cp "$RULES_CONSOLIDATED/engineering-standards.md" "$CLAUDE_HOME/rules/"
            echo -e "  ${GREEN}âœ“${NC} Consolidated rules"
            ;;
        2)
            cp "$RULES_SRC"/*.md "$CLAUDE_HOME/rules/" 2>/dev/null || true
            echo -e "  ${GREEN}âœ“${NC} Detailed rules"
            ;;
        3)
            cp "$RULES_CONSOLIDATED/engineering-standards.md" "$CLAUDE_HOME/rules/"
            cp "$RULES_SRC"/*.md "$CLAUDE_HOME/rules/" 2>/dev/null || true
            echo -e "  ${GREEN}âœ“${NC} Both rule sets"
            ;;
    esac
}

install_skills() {
    if [ -d ".claude/skills" ]; then
        echo ""
        read -p "Install skills? [y/N]: " install_skills
        if [[ $install_skills =~ ^[Yy]$ ]]; then
            mkdir -p "$CLAUDE_HOME/skills"
            cp -r .claude/skills/* "$CLAUDE_HOME/skills/"
            echo -e "  ${GREEN}âœ“${NC} Skills installed"
        fi
    fi
}

show_summary() {
    echo ""
    echo -e "${BLUE}Installation Summary:${NC}"

    if [ -d "$CLAUDE_HOME/agents" ]; then
        AGENT_COUNT=$(find "$CLAUDE_HOME/agents" -name '*.md' ! -name 'CONSTITUTION.md' ! -name 'CommonValuesAndPrinciples.md' -type f | wc -l | tr -d ' ')
        AGENT_SIZE=$(du -sh "$CLAUDE_HOME/agents" 2>/dev/null | awk '{print $1}')
        echo "  Agents: $AGENT_COUNT ($AGENT_SIZE)"
    fi

    if [ -d "$CLAUDE_HOME/rules" ]; then
        RULES_COUNT=$(find "$CLAUDE_HOME/rules" -name '*.md' -type f | wc -l | tr -d ' ')
        RULES_SIZE=$(du -sh "$CLAUDE_HOME/rules" 2>/dev/null | awk '{print $1}')
        echo "  Rules:  $RULES_COUNT files ($RULES_SIZE)"
    fi

    if [ -d "$CLAUDE_HOME/skills" ]; then
        SKILLS_COUNT=$(find "$CLAUDE_HOME/skills" -type d -mindepth 1 -maxdepth 1 | wc -l | tr -d ' ')
        echo "  Skills: $SKILLS_COUNT"
    fi

    echo ""
    echo -e "${GREEN}âœ… Installation complete!${NC}"
    echo ""
    echo -e "${YELLOW}Tip:${NC} See docs/CONTEXT_OPTIMIZATION.md for usage tips"
}

main() {
    show_menu

    case $choice in
        1) install_minimal ;;
        2) install_standard ;;
        3) install_full ;;
        4) install_lean ;;
        5)
            echo -e "${YELLOW}Custom installation not yet implemented${NC}"
            exit 1
            ;;
        6)
            # Rules only
            ;;
        *)
            echo -e "${YELLOW}Invalid choice${NC}"
            exit 1
            ;;
    esac

    install_rules
    install_skills
    show_summary
}

main

}
```

## Proposta MyConvergio v3.7.0

### 1. Selective Installation System

```bash
# Makefile additions
install-minimal:    # Core utilities only (5 agents)
install-technical:  # + Technical agents (12 agents)
install-business:   # + Business operations (23 agents)
install-all:        # Everything (57 agents)

# Example
make install-minimal      # Thor, Ali, Strategic Planner, Marcus, Socrates
make install-technical    # + Baccio, Rex, Dario, Otto, Paolo, Marco, Luca
```

### 2. Rules Consolidation

**MyConvergio Structure:**
```
.claude/rules/
â”œâ”€â”€ engineering-standards.md (LEAN - 3.6KB consolidated)
â””â”€â”€ detailed/ (OPTIONAL)
    â”œâ”€â”€ api-development.md (11KB)
    â”œâ”€â”€ security-requirements.md (6.2KB)
    â””â”€â”€ ...
```

**Default:** Lean consolidated  
**Opt-in:** Detailed rules via `make install-rules-detailed`

### 3. Lean Agent Variants

**Generate stripped versions automaticamente:**
```bash
scripts/generate-lean-variants.sh

# Output: agents/[category]/[agent]-lean.md
# - Remove Security & Ethics Framework (keep reference)
# - Remove extensive examples
# - Keep core functionality
# Result: ~50% smaller context
```

### 4. Context Settings Template

```bash
# .claude/settings.json (optional copy)
{
  "env": {
    "CLAUDE_CODE_MAX_OUTPUT_TOKENS": "64000",
    "CLAUDE_CODE_DISABLE_NONESSENTIAL_TRAFFIC": "1"
  }
}
```

## Implementation Plan

   304â†’local rules_count=$(find "$TARGET_DIR/rules" -name "*.md" -type f 2>/dev/null | wc -l | xargs)

   315â†’  standard)

   317â†’    ;;
   318â†’  full)

   320â†’    ;;
   321â†’esac
   322â†’
   323â†’if [ "$VARIANT" = "lean" ]; then
   324â†’  context_size="$context_size (lean: ~50% smaller)"
   325â†’fi
   326â†’
   327â†’echo "  Estimated context: $context_size"

#!/usr/bin/env bash

# MyConvergio Selective Installation Script
# Allows modular installation with tier, variant, and rules selection

set -euo pipefail

SCRIPT_DIR="$(cd "$(dirname "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}")" && pwd)"
PROJECT_ROOT="$(cd "$SCRIPT_DIR/.." && pwd)"
CONFIG_FILE="$SCRIPT_DIR/install-config.json"

# Colors
RED='\033[0;31m'
GREEN='\033[0;32m'
YELLOW='\033[1;33m'
BLUE='\033[0;34m'
NC='\033[0m' # No Color

# Default values
TIER="${TIER:-standard}"
VARIANT="${VARIANT:-full}"
RULES="${RULES:-consolidated}"
TARGET_DIR="${TARGET_DIR:-$HOME/.claude}"
CATEGORIES="${CATEGORIES:-}"
AGENTS="${AGENTS:-}"

# Helper functions
info() { echo -e "${BLUE}â„¹${NC} $*"; }
success() { echo -e "${GREEN}âœ“${NC} $*"; }
warn() { echo -e "${YELLOW}âڑ ${NC} $*"; }
error() { echo -e "${RED}âœ—${NC} $*" >&2; }

usage() {
  cat << EOF
Usage: $0 [OPTIONS]

Modular installation for MyConvergio agents with context optimization.

OPTIONS:
  -t, --tier TIER           Installation tier: minimal|standard|full (default: standard)
  -v, --variant VARIANT     Agent variant: lean|full (default: full)
  -r, --rules RULES         Rules system: consolidated|detailed|none (default: consolidated)
  -d, --target-dir DIR      Target installation directory (default: ~/.claude)
  -c, --categories CATS     Comma-separated categories to install
  -a, --agents AGENTS       Comma-separated agent names to install
  -l, --list                List available tiers, categories, and agents
  -h, --help                Show this help message

EXAMPLES:
  # Install standard tier with lean agents and consolidated rules
  $0 --tier standard --variant lean --rules consolidated

  # Install only technical development category
  $0 --categories technical_development

  # Install specific agents
  $0 --agents baccio,dario,rex,thor

  # Install minimal tier to custom directory
  $0 --tier minimal --target-dir ./my-claude-agents

  # List all available options
  $0 --list

CONTEXT OPTIMIZATION:
  - Tier minimal:      ~50KB  context (5 agents)
  - Tier standard:     ~200KB context (20 agents)
  - Tier full:         ~600KB context (57 agents)

  - Variant lean:      50% smaller (no Security Framework)
  - Variant full:      Complete documentation

  - Rules consolidated: 93% smaller (3.6KB)
  - Rules detailed:     Full examples (52KB)

For more information: https://github.com/Roberdan/MyConvergio
EOF
  exit 0
}

list_options() {
  info "Available Tiers:"
  jq -r '.tiers | to_entries[] | "  \(.key): \(.value.description)"' "$CONFIG_FILE"

  echo ""
  info "Available Categories:"
  find "$PROJECT_ROOT/.claude/agents" -mindepth 1 -maxdepth 1 -type d -exec basename {} \; | sort

  echo ""
  info "Available Variants:"
  jq -r '.variants | to_entries[] | "  \(.key): \(.value.description)"' "$CONFIG_FILE"

  echo ""
  info "Available Rules:"
  jq -r '.rules | to_entries[] | "  \(.key): \(.value.description)"' "$CONFIG_FILE"

  exit 0
}

get_agents_for_tier() {
  local tier=$1
  jq -r --arg tier "$tier" '.tiers[$tier].agents | if type == "array" then .[] else . end' "$CONFIG_FILE"
}

get_categories_for_tier() {
  local tier=$1
  local cats=$(jq -r --arg tier "$tier" '.tiers[$tier].categories | if type == "array" then .[] else . end' "$CONFIG_FILE")

  if [ "$cats" = "all" ]; then
    find "$PROJECT_ROOT/.claude/agents" -mindepth 1 -maxdepth 1 -type d -exec basename {} \; | sort
  else
    echo "$cats"
  fi
}

install_agent() {
  local agent_file=$1
  local target_category=$2

  local agent_name=$(basename "$agent_file" .md | sed 's/\.lean$//')
  local target_path="$TARGET_DIR/agents/$target_category"

  mkdir -p "$target_path"

  if [ "$VARIANT" = "lean" ]; then
    # Check if lean variant exists
    local lean_file="${agent_file%.md}.lean.md"
    if [ -f "$lean_file" ]; then
      cp "$lean_file" "$target_path/$agent_name.md"
      success "Installed $agent_name (lean) â†’ $target_category/"
    else
      warn "Lean variant not found for $agent_name, installing full version"
      cp "$agent_file" "$target_path/$agent_name.md"
      success "Installed $agent_name (full) â†’ $target_category/"
    fi
  else
    cp "$agent_file" "$target_path/$agent_name.md"
    success "Installed $agent_name â†’ $target_category/"
  fi
}

install_category() {
  local category=$1
  local category_path="$PROJECT_ROOT/.claude/agents/$category"

  if [ ! -d "$category_path" ]; then
    error "Category not found: $category"
    return 1
  fi

  info "Installing category: $category"
  local count=0

  for agent_file in "$category_path"/*.md; do
    [ -f "$agent_file" ] || continue
    [[ "$(basename "$agent_file")" =~ \.lean\.md$ ]] && continue

    install_agent "$agent_file" "$category"
    ((count++))
  done

  success "Installed $count agents from $category"
}

install_rules() {
  local rules_type=$1

  if [ "$rules_type" = "none" ]; then
    info "Skipping rules installation (none selected)"
    return 0
  fi

  info "Installing rules: $rules_type"
  mkdir -p "$TARGET_DIR/rules"

  local files=$(jq -r --arg type "$rules_type" '.rules[$type].files[]' "$CONFIG_FILE")
  local count=0

  for file in $files; do
    local source_file="$PROJECT_ROOT/.claude/rules/$file"
    if [ -f "$source_file" ]; then
      cp "$source_file" "$TARGET_DIR/rules/$(basename "$file")"
      success "Installed rule: $(basename "$file")"
      ((count++))
    else
      warn "Rule file not found: $file"
    fi
  done

  success "Installed $count rule files"
}

# Parse arguments
while [[ $# -gt 0 ]]; do
  case $1 in
    -t|--tier)
      TIER="$2"
      shift 2
      ;;
    -v|--variant)
      VARIANT="$2"
      shift 2
      ;;
    -r|--rules)
      RULES="$2"
      shift 2
      ;;
    -d|--target-dir)
      TARGET_DIR="$2"
      shift 2
      ;;
    -c|--categories)
      CATEGORIES="$2"
      shift 2
      ;;
    -a|--agents)
      AGENTS="$2"
      shift 2
      ;;
    -l|--list)
      list_options
      ;;
    -h|--help)
      usage
      ;;
    *)
      error "Unknown option: $1"
      usage
      ;;
  esac
done

# Main installation logic
info "MyConvergio Selective Installation"
info "Configuration:"
echo "  Target: $TARGET_DIR"
echo "  Tier: $TIER"
echo "  Variant: $VARIANT"
echo "  Rules: $RULES"

# Validate tier
if ! jq -e --arg tier "$TIER" '.tiers[$tier]' "$CONFIG_FILE" > /dev/null 2>&1; then
  error "Invalid tier: $TIER"
  info "Available tiers: minimal, standard, full"
  exit 1
fi

# Create target directory structure
mkdir -p "$TARGET_DIR/agents"
mkdir -p "$TARGET_DIR/rules"

# Install agents based on selection
if [ -n "$AGENTS" ]; then
  # Install specific agents
  info "Installing specific agents: $AGENTS"
  IFS=',' read -ra AGENT_LIST <<< "$AGENTS"
  for agent_name in "${AGENT_LIST[@]}"; do
    agent_name=$(echo "$agent_name" | xargs) # trim whitespace

    # Find agent file across all categories
    local found=false
    for category in "$PROJECT_ROOT/.claude/agents"/*; do
      [ -d "$category" ] || continue
      local agent_file="$category/$agent_name.md"
      if [ -f "$agent_file" ]; then
        install_agent "$agent_file" "$(basename "$category")"
        found=true
        break
      fi
    done

    if [ "$found" = false ]; then
      warn "Agent not found: $agent_name"
    fi
  done
elif [ -n "$CATEGORIES" ]; then
  # Install specific categories
  IFS=',' read -ra CAT_LIST <<< "$CATEGORIES"
  for category in "${CAT_LIST[@]}"; do
    category=$(echo "$category" | xargs) # trim whitespace
    install_category "$category"
  done
else
  # Install tier
  info "Installing tier: $TIER"

  local tier_cats=$(get_categories_for_tier "$TIER")
  for category in $tier_cats; do
    install_category "$category"
  done
fi

# Install rules
install_rules "$RULES"

success "Installation complete!"
info "Agents installed to: $TARGET_DIR/agents/"
info "Rules installed to: $TARGET_DIR/rules/"

# Show summary
echo ""
info "Installation Summary:"
local agent_count=$(find "$TARGET_DIR/agents" -name "*.md" -type f | wc -l | xargs)
local rules_count=$(find "$TARGET_DIR/rules" -name "*.md" -type f 2>/dev/null | wc -l | xargs)
echo "  Agents: $agent_count"
echo "  Rules: $rules_count"
echo "  Variant: $VARIANT"

# Estimate context size
local context_size="unknown"
case "$TIER" in
  minimal)
    context_size="~50KB"
    ;;
  standard)
    context_size="~200KB"
    ;;
  full)
    context_size="~600KB"
    ;;
esac

if [ "$VARIANT" = "lean" ]; then
  context_size="$context_size (lean: ~50% smaller)"
fi

echo "  Estimated context: $context_size"

#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail

# generate-lean-variants.sh
# Generates lean variants of MyConvergio agents by stripping verbose sections
# Usage: ./generate-lean-variants.sh [agent-file.md] or ./generate-lean-variants.sh --all

AGENTS_DIR=".claude/agents"
SCRIPT_DIR="$(cd "$(dirname "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}")" && pwd)"
PROJECT_ROOT="$(cd "$SCRIPT_DIR/.." && pwd)"

# Colors
RED='\033[0;31m'
GREEN='\033[0;32m'
YELLOW='\033[1;33m'
BLUE='\033[0;34m'
NC='\033[0m' # No Color

log_info() {
    echo -e "${BLUE}[INFO]${NC} $1"
}

log_success() {
    echo -e "${GREEN}[SUCCESS]${NC} $1"
}

log_warning() {
    echo -e "${YELLOW}[WARNING]${NC} $1"
}

log_error() {
    echo -e "${RED}[ERROR]${NC} $1"
}

# Function to generate lean variant
generate_lean() {
    local input_file="$1"
    local output_file="${input_file%.md}.lean.md"
    
    log_info "Processing: $input_file"
    
    if [[ ! -f "$input_file" ]]; then
        log_error "File not found: $input_file"
        return 1
    fi
    
    # Check if already a lean variant
    if [[ "$input_file" == *.lean.md ]]; then
        log_warning "Skipping: already a lean variant"
        return 0
    fi
    
    # Create lean version using awk
    awk '
        BEGIN {
            in_security = 0
            in_copyright = 0
            in_example = 0
            skip_next_blank = 0
            printed_something = 0
        }
        
        # Detect Security & Ethics Framework section
        /^## Security & Ethics Framework/ {
            in_security = 1
            next
        }
        
        # Detect Copyright section
        /^<!--$/ {
            getline
            if (/Copyright \(c\)/) {
                in_copyright = 1
                next
            }
        }
        
        # End copyright section
        /^-->$/ && in_copyright {
            in_copyright = 0
            skip_next_blank = 1
            next
        }
        
        # Detect end of Security Framework (next ## heading)
        /^## / && in_security && !/^## Security & Ethics Framework/ {
            in_security = 0
            skip_next_blank = 0
        }
        
        # Detect Example sections in description
        /Example:/ && NR < 20 {
            in_example = 1
            next
        }
        
        # End example in frontmatter
        /^tools:/ || /^color:/ || /^model:/ {
            in_example = 0
        }
        
        # Skip blank line after removed section
        /^$/ && skip_next_blank {
            skip_next_blank = 0
            next
        }
        
        # Skip lines in removed sections
        in_security || in_copyright || in_example {
            next
        }
        
        # Print everything else
        {
            print
            printed_something = 1
        }
    ' "$input_file" > "$output_file"
    
    # Verify output was created and has content
    if [[ ! -s "$output_file" ]]; then
        log_error "Failed to generate lean variant (empty output)"
        rm -f "$output_file"
        return 1
    fi
    
    # Calculate size reduction
    original_size=$(wc -c < "$input_file")
    lean_size=$(wc -c < "$output_file")
    reduction=$(( 100 - (lean_size * 100 / original_size) ))
    
    log_success "Created: $output_file (${reduction}% smaller)"
    
    return 0
}

# Main execution
main() {
    cd "$PROJECT_ROOT"
    
    if [[ $# -eq 0 ]] || [[ "$1" == "--all" ]]; then
        log_info "Generating lean variants for all agents..."
        
        # Find all agent files (excluding already lean variants)
        find "$AGENTS_DIR" -name "*.md" -not -name "*.lean.md" -not -name "CONSTITUTION.md" -not -name "CommonValuesAndPrinciples.md" -not -name "MICROSOFT_VALUES.md" -not -name "SECURITY_FRAMEWORK_TEMPLATE.md" | while read -r agent_file; do
            generate_lean "$agent_file"
        done
        
        log_success "Lean variant generation complete"
    else
        # Process single file
        generate_lean "$1"
    fi
}

main "$@"

file.content:
# Engineering Standards

> Consolidated rules for software development. See ISE Fundamentals: https://microsoft.github.io/code-with-engineering-playbook/

---

## Code Style

### TypeScript/JavaScript
- ESLint + Prettier, `const` over `let`, never `var`
- camelCase (vars/funcs), PascalCase (classes/components), UPPER_SNAKE_CASE (constants)
- async/await, semicolons, single quotes, trailing commas
- Max 100 chars/line, meaningful names, no magic numbers

### Python
- PEP 8 + Black formatter, snake_case (funcs/vars), PascalCase (classes)
- Type hints required for public APIs, docstrings for public modules/classes/functions
- f-strings, list comprehensions where readable

### General
- Comments explain "why" not "what", no commented-out code
- Single responsibility, DRY, small focused functions

---

## Security (OWASP Top 10)

### Input Validation
- Validate client AND server side, allowlists over denylists
- Sanitize before storage, length limits, reject malformed input

### SQL/XSS Prevention
- Parameterized queries only, never concatenate user input
- Use ORM (Prisma, SQLAlchemy), escape user content
- CSP headers, DOMPurify for HTML, no raw `dangerouslySetInnerHTML`

### Secrets
- NEVER commit secrets to git, use env vars
- `.env` in `.gitignore`, different secrets per environment
- Rotate regularly, use secret managers (Vault, AWS Secrets Manager)

### Auth/Transport
- OAuth 2.0 / JWT, RBAC, verify auth on every request
- HTTPS only, HSTS, secure cookies (Secure, HttpOnly, SameSite)
- TLS 1.2+, account lockout after failed attempts

---

## Testing

input.content:
#!/bin/bash
# MyConvergio v3.7.0 - Modular Installation System
# Selective agent and rules installation with context optimization

set -euo pipefail

SCRIPT_DIR="$(cd "$(dirname "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}")" && pwd)"
REPO_ROOT="$(cd "$SCRIPT_DIR/.." && pwd)"
CONFIG_FILE="$SCRIPT_DIR/install-config.json"
INSTALL_DIR="${CLAUDE_CONFIG_HOME:-$HOME/.claude}"
MANIFEST_FILE="$HOME/.myconvergio-manifest.json"

# Colors for output
RED='\033[0;31m'
GREEN='\033[0;32m'
YELLOW='\033[1;33m'
BLUE='\033[0;34m'
NC='\033[0m' # No Color

# Parse command line arguments
TIER="${1:-}"
VARIANT="${2:-full}"
RULES_MODE="${3:-consolidated}"
CATEGORIES=()
SPECIFIC_AGENTS=()
INTERACTIVE=false

usage() {
    cat << EOF
Usage: $0 [TIER|CATEGORY|AGENT] [VARIANT] [RULES_MODE]

TIER:
  minimal   - 5 core agents (~50KB context)
  standard  - 20 common agents (~200KB context)
  full      - All 57 agents (~600KB context)

CATEGORY:
  technical_development
  core_utility
  release_management
  leadership_strategy
  business_operations
  compliance_legal
  design_ux
  specialized_experts

VARIANT:
  full - Complete agents with Security Framework (default)
  lean - Stripped agents without Security Framework (~50% smaller)

RULES_MODE:
  consolidated - Single engineering-standards.md file (3.6KB, recommended)
  detailed     - Separate files with verbose examples (52KB)
  none         - No rules, agents only

EXAMPLES:
  $0 minimal lean consolidated           # Minimal installation with lean agents
  $0 standard full consolidated          # Standard installation (default)
  $0 technical_development lean none     # Only technical agents, no rules
  $0 interactive                         # Interactive menu

EOF
    exit 1
}

log_info() {
    echo -e "${BLUE}[INFO]${NC} $1"
}

log_success() {
    echo -e "${GREEN}[SUCCESS]${NC} $1"
}

log_warning() {
    echo -e "${YELLOW}[WARNING]${NC} $1"
}

log_error() {
    echo -e "${RED}[ERROR]${NC} $1"
}

check_dependencies() {
    if ! command -v jq &> /dev/null; then
        log_error "jq is required but not installed. Install with: brew install jq"
        exit 1
    fi

    if [[ ! -f "$CONFIG_FILE" ]]; then
        log_error "Configuration file not found: $CONFIG_FILE"
        exit 1
    fi
}

get_tier_agents() {
    local tier="$1"
    jq -r ".tiers.${tier}.agents[]" "$CONFIG_FILE" 2>/dev/null || echo ""
}

get_category_agents() {
    local category="$1"
    jq -r ".categories.${category}.agents[]" "$CONFIG_FILE" 2>/dev/null || echo ""
}

get_rules_files() {
    local mode="$1"
    jq -r ".rules.${mode}.files[]" "$CONFIG_FILE" 2>/dev/null || echo ""
}

install_agent() {
    local agent_path="$1"
    local variant="$2"

    local source_file="$REPO_ROOT/.claude/agents/${agent_path}.md"
    local dest_dir="$INSTALL_DIR/agents/$(dirname "$agent_path")"
    local dest_file="$dest_dir/$(basename "$agent_path").md"

    # Check if lean variant should be used
    if [[ "$variant" == "lean" ]]; then
        local lean_file="$REPO_ROOT/.claude/agents/${agent_path}.lean.md"
        if [[ -f "$lean_file" ]]; then
            source_file="$lean_file"
        else
            log_warning "Lean variant not found for $agent_path, using full version"
        fi
    fi

    if [[ ! -f "$source_file" ]]; then
        log_error "Agent not found: $source_file"
        return 1
    fi

    mkdir -p "$dest_dir"
    cp "$source_file" "$dest_file"
    log_success "Installed: $(basename "$agent_path")"
}

install_rules() {
    local mode="$1"

    if [[ "$mode" == "none" ]]; then
        log_info "Skipping rules installation (mode: none)"
        return 0
    fi

    local rules_dir="$INSTALL_DIR/rules"
    mkdir -p "$rules_dir"

    if [[ "$mode" == "consolidated" ]]; then
        local source_file="$REPO_ROOT/.claude/rules/engineering-standards.md"
        if [[ -f "$source_file" ]]; then
            cp "$source_file" "$rules_dir/engineering-standards.md"
            log_success "Installed consolidated rules (3.6KB)"
        else
            log_error "Consolidated rules file not found: $source_file"
            return 1
        fi
    elif [[ "$mode" == "detailed" ]]; then
        local rules_files
        rules_files=$(get_rules_files "detailed")

        for rule_file in $rules_files; do
            local source_file="$REPO_ROOT/.claude/rules/${rule_file}"
            if [[ -f "$source_file" ]]; then
                cp "$source_file" "$rules_dir/$rule_file"
                log_success "Installed: $rule_file"
            else
                log_warning "Rule file not found: $rule_file"
            fi
        done
    fi
}

create_manifest() {
    local tier="$1"
    local variant="$2"
    local rules_mode="$3"
    local agent_count="$4"

    cat > "$MANIFEST_FILE" << EOF
{
  "version": "3.7.0",
  "installed_at": "$(date -u +"%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ")",
  "configuration": {
    "tier": "$tier",
    "variant": "$variant",
    "rules_mode": "$rules_mode",
    "agent_count": $agent_count
  }
}
EOF

    log_success "Installation manifest created: $MANIFEST_FILE"
}

interactive_mode() {
    log_info "MyConvergio v3.7.0 - Interactive Installation"
    echo ""

    echo "Select installation tier:"
    echo "  1) Minimal  - 5 core agents (~50KB)"
    echo "  2) Standard - 20 common agents (~200KB)"
    echo "  3) Full     - All 57 agents (~600KB)"
    echo "  4) Custom   - Select specific categories"
    read -p "Choice [1-4]: " tier_choice

    case "$tier_choice" in
        1) TIER="minimal" ;;
        2) TIER="standard" ;;
        3) TIER="full" ;;
        4)
            echo ""
            echo "Available categories:"
            jq -r '.categories | keys[]' "$CONFIG_FILE" | nl
            read -p "Select categories (comma-separated numbers): " cat_nums
            # Parse selected categories
            ;;
        *) log_error "Invalid choice"; exit 1 ;;
    esac

    echo ""
    echo "Select agent variant:"
    echo "  1) Full - Complete agents with Security Framework"
    echo "  2) Lean - Stripped agents (~50% smaller)"
    read -p "Choice [1-2]: " variant_choice

    case "$variant_choice" in
        1) VARIANT="full" ;;
        2) VARIANT="lean" ;;
        *) log_error "Invalid choice"; exit 1 ;;
    esac

    echo ""
    echo "Select rules mode:"
    echo "  1) Consolidated - Single file (3.6KB, recommended)"
    echo "  2) Detailed     - Separate files with examples (52KB)"
    echo "  3) None         - No rules"
    read -p "Choice [1-3]: " rules_choice

    case "$rules_choice" in
        1) RULES_MODE="consolidated" ;;
        2) RULES_MODE="detailed" ;;
        3) RULES_MODE="none" ;;
        *) log_error "Invalid choice"; exit 1 ;;
    esac
}

main() {
    check_dependencies

    # Handle interactive mode
    if [[ "$TIER" == "interactive" ]] || [[ -z "$TIER" ]]; then
        interactive_mode
    fi

    log_info "Starting MyConvergio installation..."
    log_info "Configuration: tier=$TIER, variant=$VARIANT, rules=$RULES_MODE"

    # Backup existing installation
    if [[ -d "$INSTALL_DIR/agents" ]]; then
        local backup_dir="$INSTALL_DIR/agents.backup.$(date +%s)"
        log_warning "Backing up existing agents to: $backup_dir"
        mv "$INSTALL_DIR/agents" "$backup_dir"
    fi

    # Get agents to install based on tier
    local agents
    if [[ -n "$TIER" ]]; then
        agents=$(get_tier_agents "$TIER")
        if [[ -z "$agents" ]]; then
            log_error "Invalid tier: $TIER"
            usage
        fi
    fi

    # Install agents
    local count=0
    while IFS= read -r agent; do
        if [[ -n "$agent" ]]; then
            install_agent "$agent" "$VARIANT"
            ((count++))
        fi
    done <<< "$agents"

    # Install rules
    install_rules "$RULES_MODE"

    # Create manifest
    create_manifest "$TIER" "$VARIANT" "$RULES_MODE" "$count"

    log_success "Installation complete! Installed $count agents"
    log_info "Manifest saved to: $MANIFEST_FILE"

    # Show context estimation
    local context_kb
    case "$TIER" in
        minimal)  context_kb=50 ;;
        standard) context_kb=200 ;;
        full)     context_kb=600 ;;
    esac

    if [[ "$VARIANT" == "lean" ]]; then
        context_kb=$((context_kb / 2))
    fi

    case "$RULES_MODE" in
        consolidated) context_kb=$((context_kb + 4)) ;;
        detailed)     context_kb=$((context_kb + 52)) ;;
        none)         ;; # no addition
    esac

    log_info "Estimated context usage: ~${context_kb}KB"
}

# Handle help
if [[ "${1:-}" == "-h" ]] || [[ "${1:-}" == "--help" ]]; then
    usage
fi

main "$@"
